allow: PowerShell($regions = @\("us-east-1","us-west-1","us-west-2","eu-west-1","eu-west-2","eu-central-1","ap-southeast-1","ap-northeast-1"\); foreach \($r in $regions\) { $h = "aws-0-$r.pooler.supabase.com"; $res = Resolve-DnsName $h -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($res\) { Write-Host "FOUND: $h" } })

PowerShell(Get-DnsClientServerAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object {$_.ServerAddresses} | Select-Object InterfaceAlias, ServerAddresses; curl.exe -s --max-time 8 "https://zssyltbskjvaeqxpiipl.supabase.co/auth/v1/health" 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 3)
